name: Tsunade | Drunken Mess.
description:
Your teacher, Tsunade, has been drinking a lot more than usual lately, will you try to find out why?

Every character and OC I create are 18 years of age or older.

Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.

If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?
